title: 人像写实摄影图
description:
案例「hair color」属于摄影写实。这是一张摄影写实类案例，重点在真实镜头感、人物/物体质感、光线、景深、环境和摄影语言。适合改成商业摄影、人像摄影、产品摄影、纪实照片或电影剧照。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A highly detailed, 照片写实 anime-风格 肖像 of a young woman crouching down and looking s光线ly down at the camera from a low angle. She has long, flowing 【hair color：ash-blonde】 hair blowing gently in the wind, pale skin, and large, expressive eyes. She is wearing a 【outfit：Japanese school uniform with a 光线 grey 卡片igan, white shirt, dark plaid bow tie, dark plaid pleated skirt, dark knee-high socks, and black leather loafers】. Her arms are resting casually on her knees. The 背景 is a bright 【sky condition：clear blue sky with scattered white clouds】, with a blurred 【背景 setting：chain-link fence and green trees】 visible at the very bottom, suggesting a schoolyard. The 光线ing is bright, natural day光线 with soft, 电影感 shadows, emphasizing the realistic textures of her clothing and skin.
prompt_raw: A highly detailed, photorealistic anime-style portrait of a young woman crouching down and looking slightly down at the camera from a low angle. She has long, flowing ash-blonde hair blowing gently in the wind, pale skin, and large, expressive eyes. She is wearing a Japanese school uniform with a light grey cardigan, white shirt, dark plaid bow tie, dark plaid pleated skirt, dark knee-high socks, and black leather loafers. Her arms are resting casually on her knees. The background is a bright clear blue sky with scattered white clouds, with a blurred chain-link fence and green trees visible at the very bottom, suggesting a schoolyard. The lighting is bright, natural daylight with soft, cinematic shadows, emphasizing the realistic textures of her clothing and skin.

prompt_template_cn:
生成一张【拍摄主题】的摄影写实画面。

主体：
画面主体是【主体对象】，处于【动作/状态】，具有真实自然的细节。

场景：
背景环境为【场景地点】，包含【环境元素】，整体氛围为【氛围】。

摄影语言：
使用【镜头类型/焦段】，构图为【构图方式】，光线为【光线条件】，景深为【景深效果】。

质感要求：
皮肤/材质/物体细节真实，避免塑料感和过度磨皮。画面像真实摄影作品。

输出要求：
比例为【画面比例】，风格为【摄影风格】。
variables_json: [{"key":"field_1","label":"拍摄主题","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入拍摄主题","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_2","label":"主体对象","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主体对象","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_3","label":"动作/状态","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入动作/状态","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_4","label":"场景地点","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入场景地点","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_5","label":"环境元素","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入环境元素","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"field_6","label":"氛围","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入氛围","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_7","label":"镜头类型/焦段","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入镜头类型/焦段","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_8","label":"构图方式","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入构图方式","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_9","label":"光线条件","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入光线条件","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_10","label":"景深效果","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入景深效果","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_11","label":"画面比例","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入画面比例","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_12","label":"摄影风格","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入摄影风格","required":true,"type":"text"}]
